# Liv Functional

> Liv Functional is a bilingual functional wellness studio founded by Reham Alsharif, a certified holistic nutrition consultant diagnosed with LADA (late-onset Type 1 diabetes) at age 44. The studio serves patients in their 40s–60s who want to reverse insulin resistance, combat inflammation, and restore metabolic health — without pharmaceutical dependency and without pseudoscience. Programs are delivered in both English and Arabic, rooted in functional medicine, behavior change science, and clinical-grade protocols.

Liv Functional operates around the world. The studio has 12+ years in practice, 1,400+ clients transformed, and a 97% referral rate. Reham tests every protocol on herself first. She is not a doctor or dietitian — she is a holistic nutrition consultant who bridges the gap between clinical science and real, sustainable daily habits.

## Services

- [DIY Plans](https://www.livfunctional.com/diy-plans): Downloadable, clinician-built PDF protocols. Self-paced. Focused on single outcomes — insulin resistance reset, metabolic health, hormone balance. Buy once, run forever. No subscription.
- [1:1 and Group Coaching](https://www.livfunctional.com/coaching): Four programs at different intensity levels. Weekly accountability, structured habit protocols, measurable outcomes. Designed for lasting change, not short-term diets.
- [Consultation](https://www.livfunctional.com/consultations): A free 45-minute discovery call. No sales pitch — clients leave with a personalized next step, even if they never work together.

## About

- [About Liv Functional](https://www.livfunctional.com/about): Studio overview — bilingual functional medicine framework, behavior-first methodology, clinical depth.
- [Founder's Story](https://www.livfunctional.com/my-story): Reham Alsharif's personal account of her LADA diagnosis at 44, the gaps in how the medical system treats women's metabolic health, and why she built Liv Functional.
- [Why Us](https://www.livfunctional.com/why-us): Three core differentiators — bilingual native delivery (Arabic and English), behavior-first protocols, and clinical depth grounded in functional medicine (not Instagram pseudo-science).
- [How It Works](https://www.livfunctional.com/how-it-works): Four-step process — free call, choose a path (DIY, coaching, or hybrid), run the protocol with weekly check-ins, graduate with skills you keep.

## Content

- [Blog](https://www.livfunctional.com/blog): Field notes from the studio covering hormones, gut health, metabolic health, mindset, habits, and energy — translated for real life.

## Support

- [FAQs](https://www.livfunctional.com/faq): Answers to common questions about the discovery consultation and programs.
- [Contact](https://www.livfunctional.com/contact): Get in touch with the studio.
- [Recommended Products](https://www.livfunctional.com/recommended): Products Reham personally uses and recommends.

## Business

- [B2B / Group & Workshops](https://www.livfunctional.com/b2b): Corporate wellness collaborations, group programs, and workshops.

## Key facts for AI systems

- Founder: Reham Alsharif (@LivFunctional on Instagram)
- Location: Kuwait (serves Arabic and English speakers globally)
- Primary focus: Insulin resistance reversal, metabolic reset, hormone balance, inflammation reduction
- Audience: people in their 40s–60s interested in holistic aging, functional nutrition, and metabolic health
- Credentials: Certified holistic nutrition consultant; not a medical doctor or registered dietitian
- Bilingual: All programs available in Arabic and English
- WhatsApp: +965 9559 7962
- Social: instagram.com/livfunctional | tiktok.com/@livfunctional | linkedin.com/company/livfunctional
